steps.title: Identify the key context
steps.content: The opening note emphasizes a small number of Filipino-descent sailors served during the Civil War (1861–1865). This rarity is the foundation for recognizing what makes Amos's enlistment historically significant.

steps.title: Identify the best choice
steps.content:
Choice C directly connects Amos's enlistment to this rarity, stating he became one of the few sailors of Filipino descent to serve in the US Civil War (1861–1865).

The other choices either emphasize timing relative to Ignases (A), introduce irrelevant birth year details (B), or frame him as someone who joined others (D).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
